title: PLMBR Talk Good Boy
description: Built an Inkbox-powered operator console and sales agent for PLMBR. The app combines a FastAPI backend, static operator-console UI, SQLite/Postgres-compatible persistence, Gmail historical backfill, Telegram founder commands, conversation clustering, alias resolution, two Inkbox identities, investor CC behavior, no-response follow-ups, hard-pass intro asks, and PLMBR provider claim-account flows. The main learning was wiring live communication providers into an auditable agent loop while keeping the demo safe to run locally.
